name: Chrysos Corporation Limited
analysis: C79 has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 38% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (0.9× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$6.3000, stop A$5.7915, target A$7.3600 (2.08:1) — then trail it.
